name: Candlestick
image_match: Flat Bench Lying Leg Raise — the candlestick drives the legs vertical and lifts the hips, the same lower-ab / hip-lift pattern as a lying leg/hip raise. yuhonas has no 'candlestick'; Flat_Bench_Lying_Leg_Raise (HTTP 200) is the closest match.
form_cues: Legs vertical, lift the hips off the floor
notes: Phase 1 PT core move — legs vertical, hip lift.
instructions: Lie on your back with legs extended straight up toward the ceiling.
Press through and lift the hips off the floor, driving the feet upward.
Lower the hips back down under control without letting the legs drop.
